display.purpose: Home-page hero only. One per page maximum.

headline.purpose: Page H1 on every non-home page.

body.purpose: Default reading face. 1.85 leading is required for Thai script.

body-large.purpose: Lead paragraphs under hero or section headers.

label.purpose: Eyebrow text, chip labels, table headers. Uppercase, 0.2em tracking.

mono.purpose: Dose values in DoseTable, inline code. Sized 0.9em to not protrude.

shadows.name: resting-card
shadows.purpose: Default card grounding. Nearly invisible. The cream-to-white tonal step does most of the elevation work.

shadows.name: lifted-card
shadows.purpose: Diffuse hover shadow under cards. Applied with a 2px upward translate on hover and focus.

motion.name: ease-default
motion.purpose: Default state transitions on cards, buttons, chips.

motion.name: lift-translate
motion.purpose: Card hover lift. Pairs with lifted-card shadow.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Filled teal pill. Used once per page on the dominant call to action.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: #0d9488; color: #ffffff; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Thai Looped', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.625rem 1.25rem; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease, background 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0f766e; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 10px 20px -10px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0d9488; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Outline pill with teal-hover. Used for the secondary path next to the primary CTA.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-secondary">ดูเปปไทด์ทั้งหมด</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; background: transparent; color: #0f172a; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Thai Looped', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 0.5625rem 1.1875rem; border: 1px solid #d4cdbb; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 200ms ease, color 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #0d9488; color: #0d9488; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0d9488; outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Category Chip
components.description: Pill chip with a leading dot and uppercase wide-tracked label. The default brand variant uses Marginalia Teal; category variants swap to the matching -soft and saturated colors.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; background: #ccfbf1; color: #0f766e; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Thai Looped', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.6; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; } .ds-chip::before { content: ""; width: 0.375rem; height: 0.375rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: currentColor; }

components.name: Category Card
components.description: Index card for a peptide or guide. Top gradient stripe carries the category color; chip and title repeat it. Lifts on hover.
components.html:
GLP-1

เซมากลูไทด์ (Semaglutide)

ตัวยายอดนิยมสำหรับลดน้ำหนัก กลไก โดสเริ่มต้น ผลข้างเคียง

อ่านต่อ →
components.css: .ds-card { position: relative; display: block; background: #ffffff; color: #0f172a; border: 1px solid #e7e2d6; border-radius: 1rem; padding: 1.25rem; overflow: hidden; text-decoration: none; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px 0 rgb(15 23 42 / 0.04), 0 1px 3px 0 rgb(15 23 42 / 0.06); transition: transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease, border-color 200ms ease; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Thai Looped', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); border-color: #d4cdbb; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px -10px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.18), 0 4px 10px -4px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.1); } .ds-card__stripe { position: absolute; top: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 4px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #e11d48, rgba(225, 29, 72, 0.3)); } .ds-card__chip { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.375rem; background: #ffe4e6; color: #e11d48; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 0.125rem 0.625rem; border-radius: 9999px; margin-top: 0.75rem; } .ds-card__chip::before { content: ""; width: 0.375rem; height: 0.375rem; border-radius: 9999px; background: currentColor; } .ds-card__title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.35; margin: 0.75rem 0 0; transition: color 200ms ease; } .ds-card:hover .ds-card__title { color: #e11d48; } .ds-card__body { color: #475569; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.75; margin: 0.5rem 0 0; } .ds-card__cta { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.25rem; color: #e11d48; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; margin-top: 1rem; transition: transform 200ms ease; } .ds-card:hover .ds-card__cta { transform: translateX(2px); }

components.name: Warning Callout
components.description: MDX callout. Three variants share the shape; Warning uses Safety Red. Top stripe, icon tile, label, body.
components.html:
ระวัง

อย่าใช้เปปไทด์ที่ผ่านวันหมดอายุ และเก็บในตู้เย็นเท่านั้น
components.css: .ds-callout { position: relative; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e7e2d6; border-radius: 1rem; overflow: hidden; margin: 1.5rem 0; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Thai Looped', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-callout__stripe { height: 4px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #dc2626, rgba(220, 38, 38, 0.3)); } .ds-callout--important .ds-callout__stripe { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #0d9488, rgba(13, 148, 136, 0.3)); } .ds-callout--tip .ds-callout__stripe { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #2563eb, rgba(37, 99, 235, 0.3)); } .ds-callout__row { display: flex; gap: 0.75rem; padding: 1rem; } .ds-callout__icon { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.75rem; height: 1.75rem; flex-shrink: 0; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: #fee2e2; color: #dc2626; } .ds-callout--important .ds-callout__icon { background: #ccfbf1; color: #0d9488; } .ds-callout--tip .ds-callout__icon { background: #dbeafe; color: #2563eb; } .ds-callout__label { margin: 0; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #dc2626; } .ds-callout--important .ds-callout__label { color: #0d9488; } .ds-callout--tip .ds-callout__label { color: #2563eb; } .ds-callout__body { margin-top: 0.25rem; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.75; color: #0f172a; }

components.name: Dose Pill
components.description: Mono-set dose value pill used in DoseTable cells. The visual anchor for load-bearing dose data.
components.css: .ds-dose { display: inline-block; background: #ccfbf1; color: #0f766e; font-family: 'Geist Mono', ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 0.125rem 0.5rem; border-radius: 0.375rem; }

components.name: Nav Logo
components.description: Brand mark in the sticky header: 28px gradient glyph that rotates 6deg on hover, plus the Thai wordmark.
components.html: เปปจาพอร์ทัล
components.css: .ds-logo { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 0.5rem; color: #0f172a; text-decoration: none; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans Thai Looped', ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: -0.005em; } .ds-logo__glyph { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 1.75rem; height: 1.75rem; border-radius: 0.5rem; background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d9488, #7c3aed); color: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgb(15 23 42 / 0.1); transition: transform 200ms ease; } .ds-logo:hover .ds-logo__glyph { transform: rotate(6deg); }

narrative.overview: Pepja's surface is a reader's notebook. Warm cream page, ruled lines in restrained warm gray, marginalia in teal, color-coded tabs along the edge for category at a glance. The aesthetic descends from gray.guide and Stairway to Gray, two community-written harm-reduction references where the writing is the product and the page exists to amplify reading. The system carries that posture into Thai, with a Thai-optimized body face (IBM Plex Sans Thai Looped) set at 1.85 leading so the script breathes correctly. The personality is lifted and responsive without being app-like. Card surfaces rest nearly flat and lift on touch. Components recede when not needed; color is wayfinding, not decoration. Every peptide category and guide type owns a hue so a reader can orient by glance. Dark mode is a first-class theme designed for late-night phone reading, not an afterthought toggle.
keyCharacteristics: Warm cream paper, never pure white in non-card surfaces.
One reader-friendly Thai face across every type role; weight varies, family does not.
Color coded by content category; ten named hues that always carry meaning.
Cards rest flat and lift on hover with diffuse shadow.
Mobile-first reading rhythm with 1.85 body leading.

rules.name: The Category-Color Rule
rules.body: Every peptide category and every guide category owns one hue. The hue appears on the index card (top-stripe and chip), on the detail-page header (top-stripe and blurred backdrop blob), and on the in-text chip. Nowhere else. A reader who learns that violet means longevity learns it once.

rules.name: The Cream-Not-White Rule
rules.body: The page background is Notebook Cream (#fbfaf7), never Page White. Page White is reserved for elevated card and hero surfaces. The tonal step from cream to white is how depth is conveyed without shadow at rest.

rules.name: The One-Voice Rule
rules.body: Marginalia Teal is the only brand color. Category colors identify content; they do not represent the brand. A new component that needs a default accent uses teal, not a category color.

rules.name: The 1.85 Rule
rules.body: Body line-height is 1.85, not the Latin-default 1.5. Thai script ascends and descends further than Latin; tighter leading collides characters and reads as cramped.

rules.name: The Looped Rule
rules.body: Only the looped variant of IBM Plex Sans Thai is acceptable. The loopless variant fails the brand-personality test (cold, computational) and is harder for Thai readers at long reading lengths.

rules.name: The One-Face Rule
rules.body: One family across display, body, label. Weight, size, and tracking carry every hierarchical signal. No serif display, no second sans for polish.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Cards rest nearly flat. Lift is a response to state (hover, focus), never a resting decoration. A card with a heavy resting shadow is the SaaS-template tell from PRODUCT.md and is forbidden.

rules.name: The No-Glow-On-Text Rule
rules.body: Text never carries shadow, glow, or text-shadow of any kind. Glow-on-headings is the supplement-bro tell.

dos: Do use Marginalia Teal (#0d9488) as the only brand color. Category colors identify content, not the brand.
Do set body line-height to 1.85 for Thai script. Tighter leading collides characters and reads as cramped.
Do carry the category color through index card (top-stripe and chip), detail-page header (top-stripe and blurred backdrop blob), and active states. Nowhere else.
Do use Page White only for elevated card surfaces. Page backgrounds are Notebook Cream.
Do lift cards on hover by translating up 2px and transitioning to the diffuse Lifted Card shadow.
Do keep buttons pill-shaped (9999px radius) across primary, secondary, and utility variants.
Do test every layout at phone width first. PRODUCT.md commits to mobile-first as the baseline.
Do match dark-mode contrast to light mode. Dark is not a dim afterthought, it is a first-class theme.
donts: Don't use any side-stripe (border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored accent) on cards or callouts. Use a top-edge gradient stripe instead.

Don't apply gradient backgrounds clipped to text (background-clip: text over a gradient). Use solid Marginalia Teal or Notebook Ink. Emphasis is carried by weight and size. The current homepage .gradient-text utility is a deviation, flag and remediate.
Don't decorate with glassmorphism. The one allowed blur is the sticky-nav backdrop, which is functional, not decorative.
Don't build the hero-metric template (big number, small label, supporting stats). Pepja is editorial, not a SaaS dashboard. PRODUCT.md anti-reference: Generic AI-template SaaS.
Don't build identical three-up icon-card grids. If three cards must appear together, they must differ in role, color, and content shape. PRODUCT.md anti-reference: Generic AI-template SaaS.

Don't use red warning blocks on every page. Safety Red is reserved for genuine safety callouts and the disclaimer. Overusing red collapses into the fearmongering-blog tell. PRODUCT.md anti-reference: Fearmongering health blogs.
Don't use loud all-caps BUY NOW, urgency banners, transformation photos, or testosterone-bro voice. PRODUCT.md anti-reference: Hype supplement and bro-science sites.
Don't introduce a second font family. Weight and size are the only hierarchy controls.
Don't use pure #000 or #fff for text or borders. Neutrals are tinted toward Marginalia Teal.
Don't apply heavy resting shadows on cards. Shadows are a response to state, not a default.
Don't use the loopless IBM Plex Sans Thai variant. Only the looped variant.
Don't use em dashes in UI copy or article body. Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods, or parentheses.
